description: Mexican criminal organization founded in 2008 by Jorge Ernesto Sáenz and Éder Ángel Martínez, originally serving as the armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel in Ciudad Juárez and the El Paso metropolitan area. Known for their artistic skills in drawing and graffiti, they engage in homicide, drug dealing, extortion, and robbery. Currently one of the main violent groups in Chihuahua, controlling part of the Cereso 3 prison and in conflict with rival groups.

country_links.evidence_quote: Artistas Asesinos ... trabajaban como ala armada del Cartel de Sinaloa en Ciudad Juárez y el Área metropolitana de El Paso.
country_links.context: The organization operated in the El Paso metropolitan area as the armed wing of the Sinaloa Cartel.
